TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sado, title = Sado, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sado} }

S.FORM: alang Sado ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 272 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 246 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 85%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sado hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Sado hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sado hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sado hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sado hya' ga Tafalong. tay mkyahu' na Sado hya' ga Kalotong. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sado ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 272 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 246 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 85%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sado hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Sado hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sado hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sado hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sado hya' ga Tafalong. tay mkyahu' na Sado hya' ga Kalotong. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕa*o ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu koŋβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, keβalan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*o ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na s~ɕa*o ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*o ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*o ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*o ħjaʔ ɣa ta*aloŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*o ħjaʔ ɣa kalotoŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
